hero.subtitle: LATIN AMERICAN CTF TEAM
hero.title: CAZA BANDERAS
hero.description1: We hunt together, we learn together and we conquer challenges as a united front.
hero.description2: From web exploitation to reverse engineering — each flag has a hunter.
hero.platforms: HACKTHEBOX · TRYHACKME · HACKINGCLUB · CTFS EN VIVO

items.name: HackTheBox
items.description: The premier cybersecurity training platform. We compete in live machines, challenges, and tournaments.

items.name: TryHackMe
items.description: Interactive learning platform with guided rooms and challenges. Perfect for skill development.

items.name: HackingClub
items.description: Latin American CTF platform for regional competitions and challenges.

items.name: Live CTFs
items.description: In-the-wild competitions and real-world CTF events where we test our skills.

categories.label: DISCIPLINAS
categories.title: NUESTRO ARSENAL
categories.subtitle: Each category is a weapon. All of us are armed.

items.name: OSINT
items.desc: Open-source intelligence gathering and investigation techniques.

items.name: Mobile
items.desc: iOS and Android exploitation and security assessments.

items.name: Web
items.desc: Web application security, SQL injection, XSS, SSRF, IDOR.

items.name: GamePwn
items.desc: Game hacking, memory manipulation, motor tricks and game vulnerabilities.

items.name: Reversing
items.desc: Static and dynamic reverse engineering of VM, firmware and anti-debug.

items.name: AI/ML
items.desc: Machine learning attacks, adversarial examples, neural network exploitation.

items.name: Crypto
items.desc: RSA, ECC, AES, hash collisions and personalized cipher analysis.

items.name: Hardware
items.desc: Hardware hacking, side-channel attacks, exploitation of integrated systems.

items.name: Secure Coding
items.desc: Algorithm challenges, programming puzzles and CTF coding competitions.

items.name: Forensics
items.desc: Memory forensics, disk images, artifact recovery and system analysis.

items.name: Blockchain
items.desc: Smart contract exploitation, blockchain security and cryptocurrency analysis.

items.name: Coding
items.desc: Algorithm challenges, programming puzzles and CTF coding competitions.

items.name: Misc
items.desc: Miscellaneous challenges and unconventional security problems.

team.subtitle: LA CAZA
